---
title: "OceanLens Experiments"
description: "Interactive static dashboard for OceanLens super-resolution model versions."
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

<section class="hero">
  <div>
    <h1>OceanLens model versions</h1>
    <p>
      This website tracks the OceanLens super-resolution experiments from the first Flow Matching baselines
      to the recent Swin, DiT, EDM and bridge variants. Each version page documents the motivation,
      architecture, training setup, research inspiration, figures and metrics.
    </p>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-panel">
    <strong>Current scope</strong>
    <p>Skeleton first. Figures and metrics will be pulled from LIR results in the next step.</p>
    <div class="tag-row">
      <span class="tag">CNO</span>
      <span class="tag">Flow Matching</span>
      <span class="tag">Swin</span>
      <span class="tag">DiT</span>
      <span class="tag">EDM</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

## Experiment Timeline

::: {.version-grid}
::: {.version-card}
### v4 family
Residual Flow Matching with CNO conditioning. Main ablations: coupling, time sampling, attention, gradient conditioning.

[Open v4 overview](versions/v4.qmd)
:::

::: {.version-card}
### v4 fine-tunings
Re-coarsening consistency, classifier-free guidance and regional sampling.

[Open v4_s1_logit_t](versions/v4_s1_logit_t.qmd)
:::

::: {.version-card}
### v6/v7/v8
Physics/geography variants, Swin local attention, and pixel-space DiT global attention.

[Open v8a DiT](versions/v8a_dit_pixel.qmd)
:::

::: {.version-card}
### v9 candidates
NCSN++/SongUNet EDM, diffusion bridge and CFG/recoarsened DiT.

[Open v9a EDM](versions/v9a_songunet_edm.qmd)
:::
:::

## Figure Contract

Each variable page expects three figure families:

| Figure | Content | Example path |
|---|---|---|
| Presentation | HR, CNO, CNO+FM | `assets/figures/<version>/<var>/presentation.png` |
| Residuals | HR-LR, CNO residual, FM residual | `assets/figures/<version>/<var>/residuals.png` |
| Errors | CNO error, FM error | `assets/figures/<version>/<var>/errors.png` |

Metrics are expected as `assets/metrics/<version>.csv`.
